channel.title: Comments on: Atlanta Brewing Red Brick Brown Ale – Ep. 45
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Hi Diana, Thanks for coming to the site and leaving a comment. The BBC is yet another great example of good people brewing great beer. Michael Tesoro is a partner of ours helping BATV grow. He knows the folks at the BBC and shot the story for us - what do you think of him?
item.content:encoded:
Hi Diana,
Thanks for coming to the site and leaving a comment. The BBC is yet another great example of good people brewing great beer. Michael Tesoro is a partner of ours helping BATV grow. He knows the folks at the BBC and shot the story for us – what do you think of him?

item.title: By: Diana
item.dc:creator: Diana
item.description: Enjoyed the visit to Berkshire Brewing Company. I am going to order a sampler (I hope they offer one) as soon as I finish this e-mail. Who is Michael Tesoro? Is he going to do more segments? Congrats!
item.content:encoded:
Enjoyed the visit to Berkshire Brewing Company. I am going to order a sampler (I hope they offer one) as soon as I finish this e-mail.
Who is Michael Tesoro? Is he going to do more segments?
Congrats!
